description: Versioned programme registry for SP-6 true-cost prices. All discount values are placeholders pending curator sign-off (cdenn) per spec §3 curation note. Edit via PR; do not modify in production DB. Bump schema_version on structural shape changes.

programmes.name: 7-Eleven Fuel App
programmes.conditions_text: 7-Eleven Fuel App members receive a typical saving of 4¢/L on fuel at 7-Eleven service stations when paying via the app. This models the typical daily savings reported by 7-Eleven; it does not represent the Fuel Lock feature (which locks a price 7 days in advance) and is not available in conjunction with other offers. Savings vary by location and day.
programmes.notes: Fuel-lock feature is explicitly out of scope (SP-6 master spec §non-goals). Modelled as flat 4¢ approximation per Q1 recommended default.

programmes.name: RACQ Membership
programmes.conditions_text: RACQ members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Ampol service stations in Queensland. Discount applied at point of sale on presentation of RACQ membership card or digital card via the RACQ app. Excludes AdBlue, LPG, and premium lubricants.
programmes.notes: AmpolCash + RACQ stacking: NOT enabled in v1. Ship both as non-stackable; verify in first quarterly audit (Q3 2026) before enabling. See Q2 open question in spec.

programmes.name: NRMA Membership
programmes.conditions_text: NRMA members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Ampol service stations. Discount applied on presentation of NRMA membership card. Offer available at participating sites only; verify availability at your local station.

programmes.name: RACV Membership
programmes.conditions_text: RACV members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Ampol service stations. Discount applied on presentation of RACV membership card or via the RACV app.

programmes.name: RAA Membership (SA)
programmes.conditions_text: RAA members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Ampol/Caltex service stations. Discount applied on presentation of RAA membership card. Available at participating sites; coverage varies in Queensland.
programmes.notes: SA-based club; shown to all users per Q3 decision (members travel interstate).

programmes.name: RAC Membership (WA)
programmes.conditions_text: RAC members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Ampol service stations. Discount applied on presentation of RAC membership card or via the RAC app. Available at participating sites; verify availability in Queensland.
programmes.notes: WA-based club; shown to all users per Q3 decision.

programmes.name: RACT Membership (TAS)
programmes.conditions_text: RACT members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Ampol service stations. Discount applied on presentation of RACT membership card or digital card. Available at participating sites; verify availability in Queensland.
programmes.notes: TAS-based club; shown to all users per Q3 decision.

programmes.name: Woolworths 4¢ Docket
programmes.conditions_text: Woolworths 4¢/L fuel dockets are earned on qualifying Woolworths supermarket purchases. Present your docket or Everyday Rewards card at participating EG Ampol or Caltex Woolworths stations. One docket per fill; expires 30 days from issue. Single-use.
programmes.notes: Docket type: UI shows secondary toggle 'I have a docket right now' (paused flag). Enable this for quick on/off without un-enrolling.

programmes.name: Coles 4¢ Docket
programmes.conditions_text: Coles 4¢/L fuel dockets are earned on qualifying Coles supermarket purchases. Present your docket or Flybuys card at participating Shell Coles Express stations. One docket per fill; expires 30 days from issue. Single-use.
programmes.notes: Docket type: same paused-toggle UI treatment as woolworths_docket.

programmes.name: Shell V-Power Rewards
programmes.conditions_text: Shell V-Power Rewards members receive 4¢/L off pylon price at participating Shell service stations when paying via the Shell app or with a linked card. Discount excludes Shell Coles Express sites.
programmes.notes: Shell-branded only; excludes shell_coles_express deliberately (different programme).

programmes.name: EG Ampol AmpolCash
programmes.conditions_text: EG Ampol AmpolCash rewards members receive 6¢/L off pylon price at participating EG Ampol service stations when paying via the AmpolCash app. Discount rate subject to change; verify current rate at ampol.com.au. Excludes AdBlue, LPG, and shop purchases.
programmes.notes: 6¢/L is the highest single-programme discount in v1. AmpolCash + RACQ stacking is real but NOT enabled in v1 (stackable: false). Quarterly audit Q3 2026.

programmes.name: United Convenience Club
programmes.conditions_text: United Convenience Club members receive 5¢/L off pylon price at participating United Petroleum service stations when paying via the United app or with a registered card. Discount applied automatically on valid payment method.
